name: Get listed on The Blue Book
description: Commercial construction company? Make sure that you are listed on The Blue Book
richtext:
Step 1: Find your business

The Blue Book Network is the most active and the largest networking site for businesses in commercial construction industry. If you are a company that provides construction services or sells products for the construction industry, you can get your business listed on the Blue Book Network. To register your company with the Blue Book, go to the homepage of The Blue Book and click on “List your Company”.

Step 2: Complete your Company Profile

To qualify for a free listing on the Blue Book, you will have to furnish some information about your company including contact number, website, address and the line of business.Please note that you will also have to select the areas in which you do business.

If you are offering a service in a particular region, you will also have to select counties where you operate before you can submit your company.

Step 3: Complete the Listing Process

After you submit the form described in step #2, the Blue Book Network will call you to confirm the information. Your business will be listed on the Blue Book after all the information that you have mentioned is verified by the Blue Book. If your company is already listed and you wish to claim the listing, you will have to get in touch with the Blue Book Network by mail or phone.
join_title: Spend More Time Running Your Business
join_description: And, less time obsessing about your local presence

seo.title: Get listed on Bluebook
seo.description: Learn how to claim and create your Thebluebook business listing with this quick and simple tutorial.
